name: I have back problems already, fell off ladder at work, will comp cover?
description: Yes, covers aggravation of prior issues.

mainEntity.name: I have back problems already, fell off ladder at work, will comp cover?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, covers aggravation of prior issues.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, if work fall aggravated your pre-existing condition.**

Comp covers worsening; not just new injuries. Prove via medical opinion.[5]

- Doctor links aggravation to fall.
- Idaho cases combine pre-existing with work injury.[6]
- No need to apportion fully.

Get specialist eval; commissions award if work contributed.
